mapper.select: SELECT CASHFLOW_BASE_ID, BATCH_EXECUTION_ID, CONTRACT_ID, CONTRACT_NO, INSTALLMENT_NO, PAYMENT_DATE, SCHEDULED_PAYMENT_AMT, SCHEDULED_PRINCIPAL_AMT, SCHEDULED_INTEREST_AMT FROM LOCF_CASHFLOW_BASE WHERE BATCH_EXECUTION_ID = #{batchExecutionId} ORDER BY CONTRACT_ID ASC, INSTALLMENT_NO ASC
